candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
Two half-cells are set up as follows:
Half-Cell A: Strip of Cu(s) in $CuNO_3(aq)$
Half-Cell B: Strip of Zn(s) in $Zn(NO_3)_2(aq)$
When the cells are connected according to the following diagram, the following reaction occurs. As the reaction progresses, what will happen to the overall voltage of the cell?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
两个半电池设置如下:

半电池 A: 铜条浸没在 $\mathrm{CuNO_3(aq)}$ 溶液中
半电池 B: 锌条浸没在 $\mathrm{Zn(NO_3)_2(aq)}$ 溶液中

当两个半电池通过盐桥连接时,将发生以下反应:
$$\mathrm{Zn(s) + Cu^{2+}(aq) \rightarrow Zn^{2+}(aq) + Cu(s)}$$

随着反应的进行,电池的总电压会:

A. 随着 $\mathrm{[Zn^{2+}]}$ 的增加而增加
B. 随着 $\mathrm{[Cu^{2+}]}$ 的增加而增加
C. 随着 $\mathrm{[Zn^{2+}]}$ 的增加而减少
D. 电压保持不变
metadata.explanation_zh: 随着反应的进行,Cu^+离子的浓度将降低,而Zn^2+离子的浓度将增加。根据勒夏特利原理,系统会朝着抵消浓度变化的方向移动。在这种情况下,反应将向反应物一侧(左侧)移动,以增加Cu^+离子的浓度并降低Zn^2+离子的浓度。因此,反应的总电位将降低。

normalized_value.rewritten_question_text:
Two half-cells are set up as follows:
Half-Cell A: Strip of Cu(s) in $CuNO_3(aq)$
Half-Cell B: Strip of Zn(s) in $Zn(NO_3)_2(aq)$
When the cells are connected according to the following diagram, the reaction proceeds. As the reaction progresses, how will the overall voltage of the cell change?

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The question asks how the galvanic cell voltage changes as the shown Cu/Zn reaction proceeds, and the image clearly provides the cell setup and reaction equation needed to interpret it. The expected answer is also clear: the cell voltage decreases as Zn2+ concentration increases.
